title: RE-D.O.N.E Client(Minewind modpack)
description: A Whole-ahh experience of a client made By me(Formerly known as D.O.N.E client)...
body:
Re-Done there 
vvv

![RE-D.O.N.E logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a32e1e4a530aace477d26519e00c56b94dc5b4dc_0.webp)

welcome to my second Modpack!
here's My new Standards for a modpack, it's called: M.C.R.S.O.S

Every Comeplete Modpack must have to include:
- M-ods that are included in the Modpack.
- C-onfigs that change your experience
(which you can also change to your liking).
- R-esource pack which you can switch in-game (using [Resourcify)](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourcify).
- S-haders that are light or heavy.
- O-ptions with the needed setup.
- S-erver list if needed.

The Modpack has all of and follows M.C.R.S.O.S standards.

-----------------------
#### Requirements: 

- A device(PC, Laptop, Etc...),
- A device with at least 4gb of RAM (allocated to the modpack),
- A decent graphics card for shaders (AMD, NVIDIA, INTEL, ETC...) (optional)
